description:
Parent epic: V3 E8: Observability standards

Source task 5/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add tests for emitted event metadata and redaction.

Epic closure criteria:
- local Jidoka traces and production telemetry share correlation fields
- observability docs remain standards-friendly and dependency-light

comments.text: Added emitted-event redaction coverage and hardened Jidoka.Trace.emit/3 so Jidoka lifecycle telemetry is sanitized before external telemetry subscribers receive it, not only when retained by the local trace collector. Regression coverage asserts metadata and measurements redact/omit prompt, raw response, secret keys, token refs, and key-assignment strings in both the emitted telemetry payload and stored trace event. Verified with format, compile, full tests, docs warnings-as-errors, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E8: Add tests for emitted event metadata and redaction
